title: Moving Day
description: Test your understanding of the video and practise useful moving house vocabulary, furniture words and British expressions.

questions.question: What are “cardboard boxes” used for when moving house?
options: To pack and carry your belongings
questions.answer: To pack and carry your belongings
questions.explanation: Sune uses cardboard boxes to pack his things for the move.

questions.question: What is a “flap” on a box?
options: The folding panel on the top or bottom of a box
The handle of a removal van
questions.answer: The folding panel on the top or bottom of a box
questions.explanation: Each cardboard box has flaps that fold and tuck together to form the base.

questions.question: What is “bubble wrap”?
options: A plastic sheet with small air-filled bubbles used to protect fragile items
A tool used to tighten screws
A cloth used to cover a table
questions.answer: A plastic sheet with small air-filled bubbles used to protect fragile items
questions.explanation: Sune wraps fragile items in bubble wrap to protect them during the move.

questions.question: What does “fragile” mean?
questions.explanation: Fragile objects can break easily, so Sune wraps them carefully.

questions.question: What is a “tape gun”?
options: A handheld device used to apply packing tape quickly
A machine used to lift boxes
A tool used to cut wood
questions.answer: A handheld device used to apply packing tape quickly
questions.explanation: Sune uses a tape gun to seal the box shut.

questions.question: What is a “removal van”?
options: A large vehicle used to transport furniture and belongings when moving house
A small car used for holidays
A box used for fragile items
questions.answer: A large vehicle used to transport furniture and belongings when moving house
questions.explanation: Sune loads the boxes onto the removal van.

questions.question: What is a “hallway”?
options: The narrow corridor at the entrance of a flat or house
The vehicle used to move house
The tool used to tighten bolts
questions.answer: The narrow corridor at the entrance of a flat or house
questions.explanation: When Sune arrives at the new flat, boxes are everywhere in the hallway.

questions.question: What is an “allen key”?
options: A small L-shaped metal tool used to tighten bolts and screws
questions.answer: A small L-shaped metal tool used to tighten bolts and screws
questions.explanation: Sune uses an allen key to assemble his flat pack furniture.

questions.question: What does “shattered” mean in British English?
questions.explanation: At the end of moving day, Sune is shattered, meaning completely exhausted.

sections.title: Video comprehension
sections.instructions: Answer the questions about the story.

questions.question: Where is Sune at the beginning of the video?
questions.explanation: At the beginning, Sune is standing in his old flat surrounded by boxes.

questions.question: What does Sune need to do first?
questions.explanation: First things first: Sune needs to build the cardboard boxes.

questions.question: What does Sune do with the fragile items?
options: He wraps them carefully in bubble wrap
He throws them into the van
He puts them under the lamp
questions.answer: He wraps them carefully in bubble wrap
questions.explanation: Sune protects the fragile items by wrapping them in bubble wrap.

questions.question: What problem does Sune have when carrying boxes to the removal van?
options: He can barely see where he is going
questions.answer: He can barely see where he is going
questions.explanation: Sune carries an enormous pile of boxes and can barely see where he is going.

questions.question: What is wrong with the shelf Sune builds?
questions.explanation: The shelf is up, but it is not straight. It is slightly wonky.

sections.title: Complete the sentence
sections.instructions: Choose the correct word or expression.

questions.question: Be careful with that glass vase. It is very ______.
questions.explanation: Fragile means easily broken or damaged.

questions.question: Sune uses an ______ to tighten the bolts and screws.
questions.explanation: An allen key is a small L-shaped metal tool used to tighten bolts and screws.

questions.question: After moving all day, Sune is completely ______.
questions.explanation: Shattered is a British way of saying completely exhausted.
